{{Quote|His name is Bandor. I don't know him very well, my husband only met him recently and never had the chance to introduce me.|[[Madison Silene]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:TtB" />}}
'''Bandor Mokk''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] who lived on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Well, I suppose I owe you. I just have to tell you, this isn't the end. It's just the tip of the asteroid. There is something big going on here. After I tell you where Kyran is, you'll be in it deep.|Bandor Mokk, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:TtB" />}}
[[File:BandorMokk.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Mug shot of Bandor Mokk.]]
Bandor Mokk was from the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Kor Vella/Legends|Kor Vella]] on Corellia. He was friend with [[Kyran Silene]].<ref name="web" /> After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], a group of [[Corellian slavers]] operating near [[Tyrena/Legends|Tyrena]] captured Kyran Silene and enslaved him.<ref name="SWG:TtB" /> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline" /> Silene and a group of slaves managed to escape the [[Corellian Slaver Bunker]]. Kyran Silene contacted Bandor Mokk but the Bothan was watched by [[Faye Patrick]], a member of the slave ring, who threatened his life.<ref name="SWG:TtB" /> Because of that, Mokk, along with Faye Patrick, were suspected to be involved in the increase of missing persons on Corellia. [[Corellian Security Force|CorSec]] [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Alana Walden]] was investigating the case, and pleaded with citizens to report Mokk's location to CorSec.<ref name="web" />

Kyran's wife, [[Madison Silene]], later recruited a spacer to investigate the disappearance of her husband. The spacer met Bandor Mokk and convinced him to talk about Faye Patrick. The spacer therefore fought and killed Patrick in a street of Tyrena. After the death of Faye Patrick, Mokk accepted to reveal everything he knew about Kyran Silene and the escaped slaves.<ref name="SWG:TtB" /> The spacer eventually met Kyran Silene in a camp outside the city and helped him to reveal the slavery operation to the CorSec.<ref name="SWG:IE">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Incriminating Evidence|Corellia}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Bandor Mokk appeared as a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']], a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:TtB" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Bandor Mokk was added to the game with the update named "[[W:c:swg:Chapter 1|Chapter 1: The Corellian Captives]]," published on [[June 8]], [[2006]].<ref name="SonyForumsCite-Chapter 1: The Corellian Captives, Publish Notes, June 8th">{{SonyForumsCite|url=swg/board/message?board.id=DevDiscussion&message.id=48548|text="Chapter 1: The Corellian Captives", Publish Notes, June 8th}}</ref>
